info.name: Usulan Jalan Status
info.description: API collection for Usulan Jalan Status module - Master data for road proposal status workflow

item.name: Query Endpoints
Get All Usulan Jalan Status (with pagination)

request.description:
Get all usulan jalan status with optional pagination.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Status Flow**:
```
1. Input Informasi Usulan Jalan
   ↓
2. Input Ruang Lingkup dan Spesifikasi Jalan
   ↓
5. Verifikasi Informasi Usulan Jalan (ADBANG)
   ↓
6. Verifikasi Ruang Lingkup dan Spesifikasi Jalan (ADBANG)
   ↓
7. Verifikasi Adbang
   ↓
8. Verifikasi Bpkad
   ↓
9. Verifikasi Bappeda
   ↓
3. Memenuhi Syarat (APPROVED)

Any rejection → 4. Tidak Memenuhi Syarat (REJECTED)
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "status": "Input Informasi Usulan Jalan",
      "createdAt": "...",
      "updatedAt": "..."
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "amount": 10,
  "total": 9,
  "totalPages": 1
}
```

item.name: Get All Usulan Jalan Status (without pagination)

request.description:
Get all usulan jalan status without pagination (returns all records).

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Use Case**: Get complete status list for dropdown/select options in frontend.

Get single usulan jalan status detail by ID.

**Roles**: OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

**Response**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "status": "Input Informasi Usulan Jalan",
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

item.description: Read-only endpoints accessible by all roles

item.name: CRUD Endpoints (SUPERADMIN Only)

request.description:
Create new usulan jalan status.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "status": "string"  // Required - Status name
}
```

**Status ID Reference**:
| ID | Status | Description | Who Can Trigger |
|----|--------|-------------|----------------|
| 1 | Input Informasi Usulan Jalan | Initial form entry | OPD |
| 2 | Input Ruang Lingkup dan Spesifikasi Jalan | Scope & spec entry | OPD |
| 3 | Memenuhi Syarat | Approved (final) | System |
| 4 | Tidak Memenuhi Syarat | Rejected (final) | System |
| 5 | Verifikasi Informasi Usulan Jalan | Info verification | ADBANG |
| 6 | Verifikasi Ruang Lingkup dan Spesifikasi Jalan | Scope verification | ADBANG |
| 7 | Verifikasi Adbang | Adbang approval | ADBANG |
| 8 | Verifikasi Bpkad | Bpkad approval | BPKAD |
| 9 | Verifikasi Bappeda | Bappeda approval | BAPPEDA |

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 201,
  "message": "Usulan Jalan Status created",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "status": "Input Informasi Usulan Jalan",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

Create scope and specification input status.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create approved (qualified) status - Final success state.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create rejected (not qualified) status - Final rejection state.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create information verification status - ADBANG verifies basic info.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create scope verification status - ADBANG verifies technical specs.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create Adbang approval status - ADBANG gives final approval.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create Bpkad approval status - BPKAD (Finance) approval.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Create Bappeda approval status - BAPPEDA (Development Planning) final approval.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

Update existing usulan jalan status.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number,      // Required - ID to update
  "status": string   // Optional - New status name
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Usulan Jalan Status updated",
  "data": {
    "id": 1,
    "status": "Input Informasi Usulan Jalan (Updated)",
    "createdAt": "...",
    "updatedAt": "..."
  }
}
```

**Warning**: Changing status names may break existing workflow logic. Use with caution!

Soft delete usulan jalan status.

**Role**: SUPERADMIN only

**Body**:
```json
{
  "id": number  // Required - ID to delete
}
```

**Response**:
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "responseCode": 200,
  "message": "Usulan Jalan Status deleted",
  "data": true
}
```

**Warning**: Deleting status that are in use by usulan jalan records may cause foreign key errors. Ensure no records reference this status before deletion.

item.description: Create, Update, Delete operations - Only accessible by SUPERADMIN
